description: App Store release pilot — version bump, TestFlight upload, metadata, review submission
name: io.github.rabdulsal/appstore-release-mcp

environmentVariables.description: App Store Connect API key ID
environmentVariables.name: APPLE_KEY_ID

environmentVariables.description: App Store Connect API issuer ID
environmentVariables.name: APPLE_ISSUER_ID

environmentVariables.description: Path to the .p8 App Store Connect API private key (alternative: APPLE_KEY_CONTENT with base64-encoded key)
environmentVariables.name: ASC_KEY_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Base64-encoded .p8 private key content (alternative to ASC_KEY_PATH)
environmentVariables.name: APPLE_KEY_CONTENT

environmentVariables.description: Apple Developer team ID (required for builds/uploads)
environmentVariables.name: APPLE_TEAM_ID

environmentVariables.description: Bundle identifier of the app to manage, e.g. com.example.myapp
environmentVariables.name: ASC_BUNDLE_ID

environmentVariables.description: Xcode project root where fastlane runs (default: current working directory)
environmentVariables.name: ASC_PROJECT_DIR

environmentVariables.description: App Store platform: IOS (default), MAC_OS, TV_OS, or VISION_OS
environmentVariables.name: ASC_PLATFORM

environmentVariables.description: Fastlane lane used for archive + upload (default: beta)
environmentVariables.name: ASC_FASTLANE_LANE

environmentVariables.description: Fastlane platform prefix, e.g. mac or ios
environmentVariables.name: ASC_FASTLANE_PLATFORM

environmentVariables.description: Full override of the upload command, e.g. 'bundle exec fastlane ios beta'
environmentVariables.name: ASC_UPLOAD_CMD
